title: thelypteris reptans var. conformis
intro: Thelypteris reptans var. conformis, also known as the "chain fern", is a variety of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris reptans var. conformis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
